prompt: Build v4 of the Watchtower board: the Floor↔Lanes BRIDGE (promote a lane item → a floor job) — the planning→execution link. The board is experiments/watchtower-board/server.mjs (+ parse-concepts.mjs); it has a Floor view (engine jobs) and a Lanes view (concepts from backlog/concepts.md). STEPS: (1) Add endpoint POST /api/promote that accepts JSON {concept, lane} and writes a VALID queue ticket to experiments/watchtower-engine/queue/<queue_id>.json where queue_id = 'q-' + a timestamp (use Date.now() / the OS clock, NEVER a made-up time) + '-promoted-' + a short slug of the concept. Ticket shape (match existing tickets in experiments/watchtower-engine/done/ for reference): { queue_id, kind: 'instruction', prompt: 'Elaborate this concept into a short brief: <concept text> (lane: <lane>)', experiment_id: 'exp-promoted', args: { from: 'lanes-board', lane }, requested_at: <ISO from OS clock>, requested_by: 'watchtower-board' }. Validate/sanitize the slug (no /, no .., alphanumeric+dash). Return JSON {accepted:true, queue_id}. (2) In the Lanes view UI, add a small 'promote ▶' button on each concept card; on click, POST to /api/promote with that card's concept+lane, then show 'promoted → <queue_id>' on the card. (3) HARD CONSTRAINTS: additive only — do NOT change the Floor view, /api/state, /api/concepts, or the staleness logic; pure Node + vanilla JS, no deps; all timestamps from the OS clock. (4) Test WITHOUT disturbing the running :7430 server: a node self-check that calls your promote-ticket-writing function with a sample {concept,lane} and asserts a well-formed ticket file would be produced (write to a temp dir, or factor the ticket-builder into a pure function and assert its output) — do NOT start/kill servers. (5) Write proof to experiments/watchtower-engine/proof/board-v4-bridge.md (max 6 lines: endpoint, UI affordance, ticket shape, how you tested, confirmation Floor/Lanes untouched). Then complete the run-next-workflow bookkeeping.
